trigger_conditions: JSON parsing errors in message handling

failure_modes.description: Multiple node processes attempting to bind to same port
evidence: Error: Port 3000 is already in use
Error: Port 5173 is already in use
Error: Port 3001 is already in use
failure_modes.root_cause: Concurrent process startup without port availability checking

prevention_strategy.implementation: Before starting server, check port availability with retry logic
prevention_strategy.test_approach: Mock port checker and test collision scenarios

failure_modes.description: Multiple processes attempting database initialization simultaneously
evidence: Failed to initialize database connection pool
failure_modes.root_cause: No connection pooling coordination between processes

prevention_strategy.implementation: Singleton connection manager with process-level locking
prevention_strategy.test_approach: Test concurrent connection attempts with mocked database

success_indicators: Single process binding successfully to port

failure_modes.description: Multiple processes writing to same SQLite database simultaneously
evidence: Transaction rollback due to lock timeout
failure_modes.root_cause: SQLite WAL mode not enabled, no write coordination

prevention_strategy.implementation: Enable WAL mode, implement write queuing system
prevention_strategy.test_approach: Concurrent write simulation with transaction verification

failure_modes.description: References to non-existent records due to race conditions
evidence: Referenced table cleanup before dependent deletion

prevention_strategy.test_approach: Test deletion order with complex reference chains

failure_modes.description: Large JSON payloads getting truncated in WebSocket transmission
evidence: Malformed message structure in WebSocket handler
failure_modes.root_cause: Buffer size limits in WebSocket message handling

prevention_strategy.test_approach: Test with various payload sizes, simulate network interruption

failure_modes.description: Character encoding issues in JSON serialization
failure_modes.root_cause: Mixed encoding handling between client and server

prevention_strategy.implementation: Explicit UTF-8 encoding at all message boundaries
prevention_strategy.test_approach: Test with international characters and emoji payloads

failure_modes.description: Single WebSocket failure causing system-wide connection drops
failure_modes.root_cause: No connection resilience or graceful degradation

prevention_strategy.implementation: Circuit breaker with exponential backoff reconnection
prevention_strategy.test_approach: Simulate connection drops and measure recovery time

failure_modes.description: WebSocket connections not properly cleaned up on disconnect
failure_modes.root_cause: Missing cleanup in connection close handlers

prevention_strategy.test_approach: Memory usage testing with connection churn simulation

process_coordination.implementation: Single process manager that coordinates port allocation
process_coordination.tdd_approach: Test process startup coordination and conflict resolution

database_resilience.implementation: Graceful database switching with state synchronization
database_resilience.tdd_approach: Test database failover scenarios and data consistency

message_integrity.implementation: Schema validation and checksums for all messages
message_integrity.tdd_approach: Test with malformed, large, and edge-case messages

connection_management.tdd_approach: Test connection lifecycle under various failure conditions
